commands: sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl -n yanxi-validation exec deploy/mooncake-metadata -- bash -c "dpkg -l 2>/dev/null | grep -iE etcd.cpp ; find / -xdev -name libetcd*.so -o -name libcppkafka* 2>/dev/null | head -10; find / -xdev -name etcd -type f -executable 2>/dev/null | head -10; which etcd go 2>/dev/null; go version 2>/dev/null" 2>&1 | head -40'
